# seerr_api_key (Data Source)

Read the Seerr API key via /api/v1/settings/main.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) The current Seerr API key.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code.
